info.english_meaning: to glow to shine to look attractive to look beautiful

upasargachandrika.example_text: praBAtAyAM SarvaryAm=BAtuM pravfttAyAm
'aTa yadetat prAtaH praBAti' (jE0 brA0 16) praBAti vyucCati
'yaM yaM lokaM manasA saMviBAti' (muRqaka0 3110) saMviBAti saMkalpayati
'tAByAM Darmo hi nirbaBO' (manu0 210) niHSezeRa prakASatAM gata ityarTaH
'suKamiva sA vibaBO viBAvarI' (rA0 12224) vibaBO vyuvAsa vyuzwA
'tasya BAsA sarvamidaM viBAti' (kaWa0 u0 2215) dIpyata ityarTaH
'ekaH sUryaH sarvamidaM viBAti' (BA0 vana0 1348) viBAti=BApayati=BAsayati
'ekEvozAH sarvamidaM viBAti' (f0 8582) ukto'rTaH
'viBAvarI sarvaBUtapratizWAM gaNgAM gatA ye' (BA0 anu0 2686) viBAvarIM prakASikAm
'sarvAnguRAneza guRo viBAti' (BA0 u0 3553) viBAti BAsayati
'na cEtatkAraRaM brahmannalpaM vipratiBAti me' (BA0 Salya0 63 5) vipratiBAti pratiBAti rocate nArTo vinA
'viSvA ABAhi pradiSaScatasraH' (aTarva 261) ABAhi prakASaya

'AyaM BAtu SavasA paYca kfzwIH' (kA0 saM0 379 lO0 gf0 44 ) ityatra ca devapAlodDfto mantraH) ABAtu prakASayatu yaTA pUrvatra taTeha BAtirupasargavaSAtsakarmakaH ramyAM ya upasarpanti dIpABAM SalaBA yaTA dIpABA dIpArciH dIpapraBA
'SarARAM gArDravAsasAm sparSamASIvizABAnAm' (BA0 vana0 3387) ABA ABAsaH
'prakarze laNGanepyati' ityamaroktiM vyAcakzARaH svAmyAha--sarvAnguRAneza guRotiBAti atikramya BAtItyarTaH
'sarvaBUtamayo'cintyaH sa eva svayamudbaBO' (manu0 17) udbaBO prAdurbaBUva utpUrvo BAtiH prAdurBAve vartata iti kullUkaH
'mA tvA kAcidaBiBA viSvyA vidat' (f0 2421) aBiBA durnimittam
'pratiBAntyadya vanAni ketakInAm' (Gawa0 15) pratiBAnti BAnti SoBante asTAne pratiH
'strIratnasfzwiraparA pratiBAti sA me' (SA0 210) pratiBAti pratIyate ABAsate
'tritaM kUpe'vahitametat sUktaM pratibaBO' (ni0 461) ukto'rTaH
'nottaraM pratiBAti me' na sPurati budDiM nopEti
'sA BAryA pratiBAti me' (kaTA) pratiBAti opayikI BAti
'tamfte pARqavaSrezWa vanaM na pratiBAti me' (BA0 vana0 8012) na pratiBAti na rocate
'kEkeyIsaMSritaM jalpaM nedAnIM pratiBAti mAm' (rA0 26014) na mAm pratiBAti na me smftimupArohati nAhaM taM smarAmi
'apsarAH pratyaBAttasya sA hi citte na devatA' (rAja0 3418) pratyABAt=AviraBUt
'aho svAmino DarmaSAstraM prati pratiBA' (tantrA0 19) pratiBA boDaH navanavonmezaSAlinI budDiH pratiBA
'pratiBAmupasargAMScApyupasaMgfhya yogataH' (BA0 SAM0 24024) pratiBA sakalaSAstrArTaBAnam
'saMvatsaraM pratIkzetA'pratiBAyAm' (gO0 Da0 2428) vaktavyaM na pratiBAtIti tadA
'deva mama sanDivigrahayAnAni trIRyapi na prati BAnti' (paYcata0 343 ityato'nantaram) pratiBAnti rocante

prayoga.literature_text: vfkzazaRqamito BAti paraM kOtUhalaM hi me
kaTaM nu Kalu kartavyaM vizamaM pratiBAti
mfRAlI paNkadigDeva viBAti na viBAti ca
mfRAlI paNkadigDeva viBAti na viBAti ca
nEtanmanasi vAkyaM me kilbizaM pratiBAti vaH
na tatra sUryo BAti na candratArakaM
vasUnAM hi varArohe devatA pratiBAsi me
baBO ca sA tena satAM matena
sarvataH saMvftaH SElo baBO puzpamayo yaTA
na baBO tadvanaM tatra dAvAnalahataM yaTA
